git.config.enabled.description: Whether git source control is enabled.
git.config.mergeEditor.description: Open conflicted files in the 3-way merge editor. When false, conflicts open as a working-tree diff and are resolved inline via conflict markers.
git.config.autoRepositoryDetection.descr: Scan workspace subfolders for nested git repositories. When false, only the workspace root is used.
git.config.repositoryScanMaxDepth.descri: Maximum subfolder depth to scan for nested git repositories. -1 means unlimited.
Folder names skipped while scanning for nested git repositories.
git.config.pullSubmoduleUpdate.descripti: After a successful pull, automatically run `git submodule update --init --recursive` when the repository contains submodules.
git.config.autofetch.description: Periodically fetch from the remote so the status bar shows incoming/outgoing commits.
git.config.autofetchPeriod.description: Interval (in seconds) between automatic fetches when git.autofetch is enabled.
git.config.blame.editorDecoration.enable: Show the blame information for the line the cursor is on at the end of the line.
git.config.blame.editorDecoration.templa: Template for the inline blame annotation. Tokens: ${hash}, ${hashShort}, ${subject}, ${authorName}, ${authorEmail}, ${authorDate}, ${authorDateAgo}.
git.config.blame.editorDecoration.disabl: Disable the hover that shows full commit info when pointing at the inline blame annotation.
git.config.blame.statusBarItem.enabled.d: Show the blame information for the line the cursor is on in the status bar.
Template for the blame information status bar item. Tokens: ${hash}, ${hashShort}, ${subject}, ${authorName}, ${authorEmail}, ${authorDate}, ${authorDateAgo}.
git.config.blame.ignoreWhitespace.descri: Ignore whitespace changes when computing blame information.
